ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the passenger (e.g., male, female) */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number of the passenger */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation (e.g., S, C) */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Class of the passenger (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status of the passenger (e.g., 0, 1) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the passenger */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "travel_history" TEXT /* Travel history of the passenger */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the passenger */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ships" (
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ship */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "route" TEXT /* Route of the ship */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the ship */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the ship was built */,
  "tonnage" REAL /* Tonnage of the ship */,
  "number_of_cabins" INTEGER /* Total number of cabins on the ship */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship's captain */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the ship's owner or operating company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship the ticket is for */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., adult, child, infant) */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the ticket */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of any promotion applied to the ticket */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise the ticket is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES schedules ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "ship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ship the schedule is for */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time of arrival */,
  "departure_port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the departure port */,
  "arrival_port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the arrival port */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise associated with the schedule */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schedule (e.g., scheduled, delayed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES tickets ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_arrival_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_ship_id FOREIGN KEY ("ship_id") REFERENCES ships ("ship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_departure_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the port */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the port */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the port */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the port */,
  "terminal_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the port terminal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities included in the class */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers the class can accommodate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer support, ticketing staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (securely stored) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
